action.reasoning: Observation: In iteration 9, the training of DKT_TargetEmb finished successfully and saved to checkpoints/best.pt, but the command failed because predict.py was incorrectly run on the hidden test data during the training phase. Analysis: I can evaluate the already trained DKT_TargetEmb model by submitting an eval request for it. To save time, I will copy the current best.pt to dkt_target_emb.pt and submit it for evaluation, while simultaneously training a new model (DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut) in the command. Decision: Rewrite model.py, train.py, and predict.py to include DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut. Run a command to copy the checkpoint and train the new model, and submit eval for dkt_target_emb.pt.
action.command: cp checkpoints/best.pt checkpoints/dkt_target_emb.pt && python train.py --model DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut --epochs 20 --dropout 0.4
